mano_cua.result_summary: 未复现bug。页面上多个z-dropdown实例（Default和Hover两个演示）独立运行，打开一个dropdown时，其他dropdown的触发按钮保持正常默认样式，无aria-expanded污染导致的异常高亮或边框变化。唯一可见的样式差异是浏览器原生focus ring（正常行为）。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Tested 3 dropdown instances (Overview Preview, Default example, Hover example). When one dropdown is opened, other trigger buttons maintain proper visual state - no unexpected style contamination. Focus ring on last-clicked button is normal browser behavior. No cross-dropdown aria-expanded visual anomaly detected.
